name: BulkSchedule
tagline: Social media scheduler. Multi-platform posting, analytics, content calendar. All free, forever.
heroSvg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><defs><linearGradient id="ph-body" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="0"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#3a3a3a"/><stop offset="15%" stop-color="#222"/><stop offset="50%" stop-color="#333"/><stop offset="85%" stop-color="#222"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#2a2a2a"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="ph-screen" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#1a2a4a"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#0e1830"/></linearGradient></defs><ellipse cx="50" cy="94" rx="22" ry="3" fill="rgba(0,0,0,.2)"/><rect x="28" y="6" width="44" height="85" rx="8" fill="url(#ph-body)" stroke="#111" stroke-width="1"/><rect x="32" y="14" width="36" height="64" rx="3" fill="url(#ph-screen)"/><rect x="36" y="20" width="8" height="8" rx="2" fill="#ff6b6b"/><rect x="48" y="20" width="8" height="8" rx="2" fill="#4a9fff"/><rect x="36" y="32" width="8" height="8" rx="2" fill="#50cc70"/><rect x="48" y="32" width="8" height="8" rx="2" fill="#ffd700"/><rect x="36" y="44" width="8" height="8" rx="2" fill="#9b59b6"/><rect x="48" y="44" width="8" height="8" rx="2" fill="#f39c12"/><rect x="42" y="9" width="16" height="3" rx="1.5" fill="#111"/></svg>

features.title: Multi-Platform Posting
features.desc: Post to Twitter/X, Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook, TikTok, and Pinterest from one dashboard. Customize per platform.

features.title: Content Calendar
features.desc: Visual drag-and-drop calendar. See all scheduled posts across platforms. Spot gaps in your content plan at a glance.

features.title: Analytics Dashboard
features.desc: Track engagement, reach, impressions, and follower growth across all platforms. Compare performance week over week.

features.title: Best Time to Post
features.desc: AI analyzes your audience's activity patterns and recommends optimal posting times per platform for maximum engagement.

features.title: Queue Management
features.desc: Set up recurring time slots and drop content into the queue. Auto-scheduling fills your calendar without manual scheduling.

features.title: Team Collaboration
features.desc: Approval workflows for team posts. Draft, review, and approve before anything goes live. Role-based access controls.

useCases.title: Social Media Managers
useCases.desc: Manage all your clients' accounts from one dashboard. Queue content, track performance, and get approval before posting.

useCases.title: Small Businesses
useCases.desc: Stay consistent on social media without spending hours. Schedule a week's worth of content in one sitting.

useCases.title: Creators & Influencers
useCases.desc: Cross-post to every platform with one click. Analytics show what content resonates so you can make more of it.
